title: cotula lineariloba
intro: Cotula lineariloba, also known as narrow-leaved cotula, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Australia. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Cotula lineariloba have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting digestive health. The leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
